title: narcissus jonquilla subsp. jonquilloides
intro: Narcissus jonquilla subsp. jonquilloides is a subspecies of the jonquil plant, a type of daffodil with fragrant white or pale yellow flowers. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Narcissus jonquilla subsp. jonquilloides include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as alleviating sinus congestion and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
